---

title: "D01_08: RSV Pre-classification"
subtitle: "Pre-classify customers using RSV (Recency-Spending-Volume) model"
parent: "D01_dna_analysis"
chapter: "CH12"
category: "derivation-task"
number: "D01_08"
date-created: "2026-03-13"
date-modified: "2026-03-13"
author: "Claude"
type: "derivation-task"
depends_on:
  - "D01_05_app_views"
implements:
  - "DM_R044": "Derivation Implementation Standard"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
---

# D01_08: RSV Pre-classification {#overview}

This task pre-classifies customers using the RSV (Recency-Spending-Volume) model and writes the results to `app_data` for use by the TagPilot RSV Matrix tab.

## Purpose {#purpose}

Move RSV classification from runtime (Shiny server) to pipeline (DRV), so the dashboard loads pre-computed results instead of recalculating on every page view.

## Script {#script}

- **Execution script**: `update_scripts/DRV/all/all_D01_08.R`
- **Classification function**: `10_rshinyapp_components/tagpilot/fn_rsv_classification.R`

## Input {#input}

| Table | Database | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| `df_dna_by_customer` | `app_data` | Customer DNA scores (from D01_05) |

## Output {#output}

| Table | Database | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| `df_rsv_classified` | `app_data` | Customers with RSV classification columns |

## Key Columns {#columns}

The output table adds RSV classification columns to each customer:

- `customer_type`: RSV segment label (e.g., "VIP", "Potential Loyalist")
- `r_class`, `s_class`, `v_class`: Individual R/S/V tier assignments

## Dependencies {#dependencies}

```
D01_05 (df_dna_by_customer)
  └─> D01_08 (df_rsv_classified)
        └─> TagPilot RSV Matrix tab (runtime)
```

## Related Principles {#principles}

- **DM_R044**: Derivation Implementation Standard
- **MP064**: ETL-Derivation Separation
- **MP029**: No Fake Data
